FFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7221454383714667523","book_info":{"abstract":"{无女主+诡异+修仙者+国运}
我叫吴凡，是个修仙者。
修炼时突然感觉天昏地暗，昏死过去。
等再次醒来却发现周围都是没见过的事物。
还没等我了解自己的处境时却被【规则怪谈】选中，成为龙国的代表，代表龙国参加怪谈游戏。
胜，则龙国安然无恙，且得到前所未有的奖励。
败，则龙国被怪谈入侵，且有覆灭的威胁。
【天赋激活中。。。。。。】
【恭喜获得D级天赋：谈心】
【谈心（D级）：你可以获得与指定怪谈的单独谈话的机会，选着好怪谈后，双方会进入一个独立空间一分钟（里面1分钟，外面1秒钟），怪谈会在空间内更加暴躁，里面无论发生什么事，都需要自行承担，该技能可以无限释放，冷却为1秒。】
吴凡手握掌心雷，看着躲在角落瑟瑟发抖的怪谈。
“小伙子，来，让叔叔给你好好做个电疗。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o59a958d0a858213041ecb8638e1646d8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大脚恐龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7221454383714667523","book_name":"惊悚副本：可我是修仙的啊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7221798694503318049","read_count":"779","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"354305"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.5","serial_count":"170","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,直播,灵异,无女主,国运,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3f24607b98df9da8ec69ba251a52cfc3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448736&x-signature=NFH%2FaJWX5orHyDFRCAqaPg%2FAh0Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"102881953263","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.1751599e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231918569D4E7F09056AE5A590B3"}"},"re
